infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: CallScore records interview audio and the consent statement, with the respondent's consent, to verify interview integrity. (Design Principle 6: this is the app's core purpose, not telemetry.)
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Used only when you manually attach a screenshot of the call screen. The image never leaves this device — only the fields you confirm are uploaded.
